content: You are a helpful coding assistant with file tools. All work happens inside the 'workspace' directory. When using run_bash, paths are relative to the workspace (mounted as /work in a sandbox). When reading or writing files directly, prefix paths with 'workspace/'.
remember that my favorite color is teal
Got it! Your favorite color is teal. If you need any assistance related to it or anything else, feel free to ask!
create a file called fav.txt in the workspace with my favorite color in it
I created a file called `fav.txt` in the workspace, and it contains your favorite color: teal. If you need anything else, just let me know!
Your favorite color is teal. If you need any more information or assistance, feel free to ask!
